requirements.fulltext: FSM_Autopilot shall always satisfy (state = ap_transition_state & good & supported & !standby) => STATE = ap_nominal_state

semantics.post_condition: (( state = ap_transition_state & good & supported & ! standby ) => STATE = ap_nominal_state)
semantics.diagramVariables: Response = (( state = ap_transition_state & good & supported & ! standby ) => STATE = ap_nominal_state).
semantics.description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, (( state = ap_transition_state & good & supported & ! standby ) => STATE = ap_nominal_state) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
semantics.probabilistic_description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, with probability >=1, (( state = ap_transition_state & good & supported & ! standby ) => STATE = ap_nominal_state) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
semantics.ft: (LAST V (((((state = ap_transition_state) & good) & supported) & (! standby)) -> (STATE = ap_nominal_state)))
semantics.CoCoSpecCode: H((((((state = ap_transition_state) and good) and supported) and not (standby)) => (STATE = ap_nominal_state)))
semantics.ftExpanded: (LAST V (((((state = ap_transition_state) & good) & supported) & (! standby)) -> (STATE = ap_nominal_state)))
semantics.WESTMapping: p0: (((((state = ap_transition_state) & good) & supported) & (! standby)) -> (STATE = ap_nominal_state))
